title: Making DeFi Truly Cross-Chain by Anna George - Devconnect
description:
Speakers: Anna George
Event: Ethereum Day (Devconnect Argentina 2025)  
Keywords: DeFi, Cross-Chain, DEX

Making DeFi Truly Cross-Chain
As DeFi expands across multiple ecosystems, fragmentation has become one of the biggest challenges for builders and users alike. This talk dives into the realities of going cross-chain - exploring how protocols can scale, and how coordination, liquidity flow, and user experience can be reimagined for a multichain world. We’ll discuss key design tradeoffs, lessons learned, and what true interoperability looks like beyond just bridges and messaging layers.

About Devconnect  
Devconnect is a week-long gathering of the Ethereum community with events for developers, researchers, artists and creators. It’s organized by the Ethereum Foundation and took place in Buenos Aires, Argentina in Nov 2025, with ~20,000 attendees. 

What’s next  
The next major Ethereum community event is Devcon 8, happening in 2026. 
For updates visit: https://devcon.org

More  
Follow us: @efdevcon · @ethereum 
Learn more about Ethereum: https://ethereum.org
And the Ethereum Foundation: https://ethereum.foundation/
